name: Google GKE
description: Google GKE Infrastructure Monitoring — monitors GKE workloads, Dataflow jobs, CronJobs, Pub/Sub, email delivery, and log-based alerting for Accessio platform components (ForgeRock IGA, Sailpoint, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch).

features: GKE workload health monitoring (Deployments, StatefulSets, DaemonSets, Pods)
Kubernetes CronJob execution tracking with success/failure rates
Google Cloud Dataflow job monitoring (batch and streaming pipelines)
Pub/Sub topic and subscription metrics with backlog alerting
Email delivery monitoring with provider-agnostic abstraction
Log-based monitoring with pattern matching and alerting
Configurable background cluster poller with per-component toggles
Alert system with threshold-based and log-based triggers
Zero-code-change architecture: local Kind/Podman ↔ production GKE
Accessio-specific monitoring for ForgeRock IGA, Sailpoint, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch
moduleDetails.author: PulseOps Team
